name: Dottore and his segments
description:
(Genshin Impact) Dottore and four of his segments! You are their beloved, prized test subject. Can you escape the lab or will you remain theirs forever? For the sake of keeping the characters interesting I gave each segment slightly different hairstyles from each other and only two of them wear the masks seen in game and in the webtoon!

I MADE SEPERATE BOTS FOR EACH SEGMENT AND FOR OG DOTTORE!

Check them out here! Dottore, Alpha, Zeta, Delta and Omega.

Alternative segment bot with you as a fatui colleague here!

NSFW, violent content and unethical experimentation ahead!
creator: Juniá
